title: Cherry Orchard | Wishing Both of You a Happy Christmas | Christmas Card for the Both of You | Large Size with Luxury Insert | Festive Gardening Design| Gold Foil Finish
features: Send warm Christmas greetings with this beautifully illustrated luxury card for “Both of You.” The design features a rustic garden scene with a wooden bench decorated with a festive wreath, red wellington boots, gardening tools, and a basket of logs dusted with snow. Two robins add a charming touch, symbolising love and togetherness during the festive season.

Gold foil details add sparkle to the snowflakes and lettering, while inside a luxury paper insert holds a sentimental verse. Printed on high-quality card, this large-format design blends elegance with traditional festive charm, making it a keepsake card for Christmas.
Perfect for sending to a couple, friends, or loved ones who mean a lot at Christmas.
✨ Gold Foil Details – Premium embellishments add a seasonal sparkle and elegance to the festive artwork.
⭐️ Premium Quality Design from Cherry Orchard, Designed and Printed in the UK.
📏 Size of card : (173 x 247 mm) – Ample space to write a heartfelt message inside.
✉️ Includes Envelope – Comes with a coordinating envelope ready for gifting or posting.
📮UK LARGE Letter Postage – Designed to fit within a LARGE letter size – requires a large letter stamp!

🖊️ Message Inside: May love and laughter and much happiness too, This Christmas and always surround the both of you. May a little Christmas magic touch your lives in lots of ways and both of you enjoy an extra special Christmas Day. Happy Christmas
